name: Q1 Product Roadmap Review
description: Cross-functional review of Q1 product deliverables and Q2 roadmap prioritisation.

hasPart.text: Q1 shipped: self-serve onboarding (✅), API rate-limit controls (✅), SAML SSO (delayed to Q2). Overall 87% of committed scope.
Self-serve onboarding is already converting at 4.2% — above our 3% target. SAML SSO is blocking three enterprise deals worth $2.8M ACV. It must be Q2 priority one.
hasPart.disambiguatingDescription: CMO highlights SAML urgency for enterprise pipeline.

hasPart.text: Agreed. SAML SSO moves to Q2 sprint 1 with dedicated squad. ETA: May 15. I'll also pull in the mobile SDK beta — enterprise customers are requesting it alongside SSO.
hasPart.disambiguatingDescription: CTO confirms Q2 priority and timeline.
